name: Odd Bot Out
author: Poki
description: Odd Bot Out is a platform game that revolves around aiding a little robot's escape from the robot company! But breaking free isn't a simple task! The company has complicated maps and challenging obstacles. To succeed, you must apply your wisdom, utilize the objects you find, connect the circuit, and press the right buttons to clean a path for the robot! Don't worry, if you ever find yourself stuck, the hint function is there to lend a helping hand. Can you guide our little odd bot to safety? How to play Odd Bot Out ? Use your finger or left mouse button to click where the bot needs to go. You could also use WASD or arrow keys for direction. Who created Odd Bot Out? Odd Bot Out is created by Fancade. Play their other games on Poki: Drive Mad , Stacktris , Monster Tracks , Recoil , Speed King , Gobble , Mekorama , and Wall of Doom ! How can I play Odd Bot Out for free? You can play Odd Bot Out for free on Poki. Can I play Odd Bot Out on mobile devices and desktop? Odd Bot Out can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
